key_points: The chapter tells the story of Anand, a young boy who wants to succeed in sports despite his physical challenges.
Shows the importance of hard work, determination, and self-belief.
Highlights how encouragement from teachers and peers can help overcome difficulties.
Focuses on achieving goals through effort, practice, and courage.
Emphasizes the lesson that perseverance leads to success.
examples: Anand participates in sports competitions despite his handicap.
His teachers and friends support and motivate him.
He practices regularly and does not give up, showing determination.
exam_tips: Remember the main character: Anand and his goal to excel in sports.
Focus on his determination, courage, and self-belief.
Note the role of teachers and friends in motivating him.
Prepare for questions on incidents showing his perseverance and achievements.
Understand the simple message: hard work and courage can help overcome challenges.
